name: » open.mp
author: layer73

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

cd /tmp || exit 1

wget -O open.mp-linux-x86.tar.gz https://github.com/openmultiplayer/open.mp/releases/download/v1.5.8.3079/open.mp-linux-x86.tar.gz

mkdir -p /mnt/server

tar -xzf open.mp-linux-x86.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C /mnt/server/

chmod +x /mnt/server/omp-server

find /mnt/server -type f -name '*.so' -exec chmod +x {} \;

chown -R root:root /mnt

export HOME=/mnt/server
